page.primary_keyword: St. Patrick's Day yacht charter Marbella
page.title: St. Patrick's Day Yacht Charter in Marbella: A Green Celebration at Sea

data.meta_description: Celebrate St. Patrick's Day with a yacht charter in Marbella. Our fleet departs Puerto Banús, includes skipper & drinks. From €749/2h. Book now.
data.summary: Celebrate St. Patrick's Day 2025 with a yacht charter in Marbella. Depart from Puerto Banús on boats from €749/2h, with skipper, drinks, and snacks included.
key_facts: St. Patrick's Day yacht charter Marbella from €749/2h (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks (beer, wine, cava, soft drinks), and snacks.
Fleet departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina.
Boats available for groups of 5 to 12 passengers.
Mangusta 80 charters start at €4,719 for 4h and include a free jet ski.
Spanish IVA (21%) already included in all prices.
Book via WhatsApp for custom durations and boat options.

faq.q: What is included in a St. Patrick's Day yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% Spanish IVA. You just bring your green outfit and good vibes.

faq.q: How much does a St. Patrick's Day yacht charter cost?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 charters start at €4,719 for 4 hours. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations for St. Patrick's Day?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring green decorations, banners, or props. Please avoid anything that could damage the boat. Our crew can help set up if you let us know in advance.

faq.q: How many people can join a St. Patrick's Day yacht charter?
faq.a: Group sizes vary by boat. Our smallest boat (Dubhe) takes 5 passengers, while larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Mangusta 80 can accommodate up to 12 passengers. Check the fleet page for exact capacities.

faq.q: What time do charters depart on St. Patrick's Day?
faq.a: All charters depart from Puerto Banús. You can choose your start time, typically from 10:00 to 16:00. Evening charters are also available for sunset celebrations.

faq.q: Is there music on board for St. Patrick's Day?
faq.a: Yes, all our boats have Bluetooth speakers or sound systems. You can connect your phone and play your own St. Patrick's Day playlist. Our crew will keep the volume at a respectful level.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on St. Patrick's Day?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we offer a full refund or reschedule to another date. We never compromise on safety.

faq.q: Can I book a St. Patrick's Day charter for a corporate event?
faq.a: Absolutely. We host corporate groups, team celebrations, and client entertainment. Contact us via WhatsApp with your group size and preferred boat, and we'll tailor a package.

data.body_html:
St. Patrick's Day in Marbella is a celebration of green, good cheer, and the Mediterranean. This March 17th, skip the crowded pubs and take your party to sea. A St. Patrick's Day yacht charter in Marbella offers a unique way to enjoy the holiday with friends, family, or colleagues, cruising the Costa del Sol from Puerto Banús.

Why Celebrate St. Patrick's Day on a Yacht in Marbella?

Marbella in March enjoys mild temperatures around 17–20°C and calm seas. A yacht charter gives you privacy, stunning views of the coastline, and the freedom to anchor at spots like Cala del Faro or Cabopino. You control the music, the drinks, and the itinerary. No queues, no noise restrictions — just your group and the sea.

Our Fleet for St. Patrick's Day Charters

All our boats depart from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella's luxury marina. Here are the best options for your green celebration:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749/2h to €2,299/8h. Ideal for small groups.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – Same pricing as Astondoa. Perfect for a lively crew.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – From €4,719 for 4 hours, includes a free jet ski. For a premium St. Patrick's Day experience.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – Spacious luxury for up to 12 guests. Price on request.
  • Dubhe (8m, 5 pax) – A smaller, budget-friendly option for intimate celebrations.

For full details, visit our yacht charter Marbella fleet page.

What's Included in Your Charter

Every St. Patrick's Day booking includes:

  • Licensed skipper (English and Spanish speaking)
  • Fuel for the entire trip
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
  • Light snacks (olives, crisps, nuts)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • 21% Spanish IVA (VAT)

You are welcome to bring extra food or decorations. Just let us know in advance.

St. Patrick's Day Itinerary Ideas

Here are three popular routes from Puerto Banús:

  • Golden Mile Cruise – Head east along the coast, past Marbella Marina and the Golden Mile. Anchor near Cala Cortés for a swim stop. Duration: 2–4 hours.
  • Estepona & Sotogrande – Sail west to Estepona's old town and the exclusive Sotogrande marina. Spot La Concha mountain in the distance. Duration: 4–6 hours.
  • Sunset Celebration – Depart late afternoon, cruise towards Cabopino, and watch the sun set over the Mediterranean. Return to Puerto Banús as the lights come on. Duration: 2–3 hours.

Your skipper can adjust the route based on weather and your preferences.

How to Book Your St. Patrick's Day Charter

Booking is simple. Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and boat choice. We recommend reserving at least one week in advance, as St. Patrick's Day is popular. Payment can be made by bank transfer or card. A 50% deposit secures your booking.

For any questions, check our main page or reach out directly. We're happy to help plan your perfect green celebration at sea.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a St. Patrick's Day yacht charter in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% Spanish IVA. You just bring your green outfit and good vibes.

How much does a St. Patrick's Day yacht charter cost?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 charters start at €4,719 for 4 hours. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

Can I bring my own decorations for St. Patrick's Day?

Yes, you are welcome to bring green decorations, banners, or props. Please avoid anything that could damage the boat. Our crew can help set up if you let us know in advance.

How many people can join a St. Patrick's Day yacht charter?

Group sizes vary by boat. Our smallest boat (Dubhe) takes 5 passengers, while larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Mangusta 80 can accommodate up to 12 passengers. Check the fleet page for exact capacities.

What time do charters depart on St. Patrick's Day?

All charters depart from Puerto Banús. You can choose your start time, typically from 10:00 to 16:00. Evening charters are also available for sunset celebrations.

Is there music on board for St. Patrick's Day?

Yes, all our boats have Bluetooth speakers or sound systems. You can connect your phone and play your own St. Patrick's Day playlist. Our crew will keep the volume at a respectful level.

What happens if the weather is bad on St. Patrick's Day?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we offer a full refund or reschedule to another date. We never compromise on safety.

Can I book a St. Patrick's Day charter for a corporate event?

Absolutely. We host corporate groups, team celebrations, and client entertainment. Contact us via WhatsApp with your group size and preferred boat, and we'll tailor a package.
